description: Deterministic syntax-closure burn-down contract for systemverilog_preprocessor.ebnf (no-regression baseline). RE-BASELINED 2026-05-17 (PGEN-SV-EXH-PROOF-0003, leaf SV-EXH-PROOF.2): max_unreachable_branches 3 -> 13. The PGEN-POST-SV-AUDIT-0002 (Cat-A macro_formals factoring) + PGEN-INLINE-ALT-FIX-0001 (SVPP-0001 pp_if_branch inline-alt lift) grammar edits legitimately added named rules/branches (total_branches rose to 50); summary.unreachable_branches = total_branches - reachable_branches is therefore arithmetically 13. This is NOT new dead grammar: the genuinely static-unreachable surface (gap report unreachable_rule_debt + unreachable_branch_debt, reason=unreachable_from_entry) is still ONLY the benign helper-only `trivia` pocket (1 rule + its 3 branches), exactly the surface the checked-in systemverilog_preprocessor_zero_plausible_gap_proof_contract.json allows (allowed_unreachable_rules=[line_comment,trivia]). unreachable_rules stays 1 (<= max 2); reachable_rules 72 (>= min 69). Re-baselined per the binding lesson that a grammar edit owns ALL its downstream proof contracts in-slice. RE-BASELINED 2026-05-18 (PGEN-SV-EXH-PROOF-0011, leaf SV-EXH-PROOF.2.3.2): max_unreachable_branches 13 -> 24, version 2 -> 3. The SV-EXH-PROOF.2.3.2 closed-loop generator correctness fixes (parser/EBNF-agnostic Mode-B structural-closer scoping + grammar-declared-sigil hazard gate + literal/probe-hint guard + line-terminator completeness) eliminate genuinely-invalid round-trip-unstable stimuli (closed-loop parseability parser_rejections 5/3 -> 0, gate-verified on BOTH the aggregate and reachability sidecars). These generator fixes legitimately change the path of the single deterministic syntax-probe sample (pipeline.stimuli_seed=24001, stimuli_count=1), so summary.reachable_branches (branches that ONE probe sample exercises) shifts 37 -> 26; total_branches is UNCHANGED at 50 (grammars/systemverilog_preprocessor.ebnf is git-verified unmodified this slice); summary.unreachable_branches = total_branches - reachable_branches is therefore arithmetically 24. This is NOT new dead grammar (verified two ways): (1) decisive stash-baseline — WITHOUT the generator change the standalone gate is reachable_branches=37/unreachable=13, WITH it 26/24, grammar identical; (2) the genuinely static-unreachable surface (gap report, reason=unreachable_from_entry) is STILL ONLY the benign helper-only `trivia` pocket (1 rule + branch::trivia::root/q#0..2), exactly the surface systemverilog_preprocessor_zero_plausible_gap_proof_contract.json allows (allowed_unreachable_rules=[line_comment,trivia], allowed_unreachable_branches=[trivia root/q#0..2]). unreachable_rules stays 1 (<= max 2); reachable_rules 72 (>= min 69). Re-baselined per [[feedback_grammar_edit_proof_gate_lockstep]] (a generator change owns ALL its downstream proof contracts in-slice), mirroring the PGEN-SV-EXH-PROOF-0003 methodology: judge by the genuine static-unreachable surface, not the count=1 probe-coverage arithmetic. NOT masking — the genuine reachability surface is provably identical; the burn-down arithmetic shifted because a correctness fix changed which valid branches one deterministic sample happens to exercise.
